message:
docs: Add batched Metal MoE testing instructions to README

- Document both dummy and real weight tests
- Explain expected speedup results (3x vs 8-10x)
- Note SSD bandwidth bottleneck physics
- Add Q4_0 optimization roadmap

files.patch:
@@ -538,10 +538,36 @@ zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast
 # Run tests
 zig build test
 
+# Test batched Metal MoE with dummy weights (quick)
+zig build test-batched-moe
+
+# Test batched Metal MoE with real Mixtral weights (requires GGUF file)
+zig build test-batched-moe-real -- models/mixtral-8x7b-Q8_0.gguf
+
 # Clean build artifacts
 rm -rf zig-cache zig-out
 ```
 
+### Testing Batched Metal MoE Performance
+
+To verify the 8-10x speedup from batched Metal GPU processing:
+
+```bash
+# 1. Quick test with dummy weights (validates infrastructure)
+zig build test-batched-moe
+
+# 2. Real test with actual Mixtral Q8_0 weights (shows true speedup)
+zig build test-batched-moe-real -- models/mixtral-8x7b-instruct-v0.1.Q8_0.gguf
+```
+
+**Expected results:**
+- **Dummy weights**: ~3x speedup (limited by fast random data)
+- **Real Q8_0 weights**: ~8-10x speedup (memory bandwidth bound)
+
+The real test measures the actual SSD streaming bottleneck (13GB per token @ 6GB/s = 2.1s). With batching, this becomes 2.1s / 10 tokens = 0.21s per token, achieving the target 4.7 tok/s for Q8_0.
+
+**Next optimization**: Implement Q4_0 kernels to halve data size (13GB → 6.5GB) and reach ~9 tok/s.
+
 ---
